web.title: Atelier Residences Miami | Pricing, Photos & Floor Plans
web.description: Atelier Miami is a 10-story, 148-residence luxury condo, located near Miami's The Roads neighborhood, with easy access to I95 expressway.
web.markdown:
![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/menubarmrg_bg2.png)

[![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/MRG-LOGO-White.png)](https://miamiresidential.com/)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Banner-Atelier-Residences-Miami-1.jpg)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/logo-atelier-miami-2.png)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/01-Atelier-Residences-Miami-Building-2.jpg)

# Atelier Residences Miami

### **2027**

10 Stories / 148 Residences of
Studios, 1, & 3 Bedrooms

**1265 SW 22nd St, Miami, FL 33135, USA**

Atelier Miami is a 10-story, 148-residence luxury condo. Its spacious residences will range from studios to three-bedrooms, with 360 square feet to 1,500 square feet. Resort style amenities in the building include a pool, fitness center, spa facilities, and a wellness-focused private club.
Atelier is located near Miami’s The Roads neighborhood, with easy access to I95 expressway.

[6 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/ateliermiami/#ForSale) from $400,000 to $1,950,000

Average Listing: $1,270 x SF ($13,670 x M2)

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

CONDOS SOLD/RENTED

FLOOR PLANS

## Prices & General Information

## Information & Prices

![08-Atelier-Residences-Miami-Bathroom](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/08-Atelier-Residences-Miami-Bathroom.jpg)

Architect/s: Gensler & E. Frances Architects

Developed by Bldg Ventures

[6 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/ateliermiami/#ForSale) from $400,000 to $1,950,000

Average Listing: $1,270 x SF ($13,670 x M2)

**Price Range**

Studios From $420,000

1 Bedrooms From $609,999



## Features

### Building Features

- Signature restaurant by James beard award-winning chef
- State-of-the-art fitness center
- Curated art installations and activations
- Front Desk Check-in & Concierge
- Porte Cochere w/24-hour Valet
- Restaurant & Lounge area
- Coffee Bar & Outdoor Seating
- Expansive double height lobby
- Members Club & Lounge
- Coffee Bar & Juice station
- Meeting Areas
- Pool & Spa Area
- Steam, Sauna, Cold Plunge
- Yoga Studio & Meditation Area
- Concierge
- Room Service
- Professional Management
- Skin Treatment/Vitality Programs, Advanced Fitness Training Programs
- Nutrition Coaching, Regenerative Therapy Massages & Treatment, Thermal Spa & Shower
- Wellness and longevity programs, including Coach/Trainer/Counsel, Hormone Balancing, Thermal Therapeutic,
IV Nutrient Program, Juice/Beverage/Meal Program

### Residence Features

- Fully furnished studios, 1-bedrooms and 3-bedroom residences
- Stunning views of Miami’s iconic skyline and water views
- Fully-integrated kitchenettes with custom countertops, backsplash and contemporary fixtures
- Top of the line appliance package
- Custom bathroom countertop and finished floors en-suite
- Contemporary custom lighting package and accent lighting
- Smart home accesories and keyless entry

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/09-Atelier-Residences-Miami-Pool.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Developer-atelier-residences-miami.jpg)

Founded in 2020, BLDG Ventures is a real estate investment firm with comprehensive expertise in development and asset management. The company has successfully invested in, developed, managed, and sold over 10 projects spanning various property types, including residential, hospitality, office, retail, and land. BLDG Ventures focuses on opportunistic and value-add investments, encompassing both new developments and distressed properties.

web.title: Atelier Miami | Short-Term Rental Luxury Residences
web.description: Atelier Residences Miami is a luxury mixed-use development crafted for the next generation of residents who value refined experiences and effortless living.
web.markdown:
## Owner-Friendly Rental Program

Curated short-term stay program that combines the comforts of home with the perks of a luxury boutique hotel.

Owners benefit from 90% of unit's ADR

Through our rental management program, maximizing earning potential.

No Hassle Ownership

Service, security, maintenance, check in and check out all included in HOAs. Say good-bye to traditional hidden fees.

Powered By World's Largest Hosting Platform

Atelier offers a fully centralized management program for owners to host on the world's largest hosting platform.

[Secure Access](https://firstaccess.ateliermiami.com/#contact)

![Exterior view of the Atelier Residences, showcasing its modern architecture and vibrant surroundings.](https://framerusercontent.com/images/9NqzfldRIhExtakg7vQS95d9Y.webp)

## Meticulously Crafted Residences

Explore stunning interiors and world-class amenities designed for refined living

[Secure Access](https://firstaccess.ateliermiami.com/#contact)

## Design Life Your Way

Atelier Residences Miami is a luxury mixed-use development crafted for the next generation of residents who value refined experiences and effortless living.

![A modern living room filled with various plants and stylish furniture, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.](https://framerusercontent.com/images/vB7yHoxrwvb7xgLcNjvFgdrxYE.webp)

#### Owners

### CAYA Members Club

- Member's only events & activations

- Private dining & lounge

- 1 year membership included for all owners


#### Owners & Guest

### Resort-Style Amenities

- 24/7 concierge

- Signature restaurant

- Serene Pool

- Brand-name fitness center

- Spa, steam, sauna & cold plunge

- Lounges & private meeting rooms


![The serene pool at the Westin Miami Beach, surrounded by palm trees and lounge chairs under a clear blue sky.](https://framerusercontent.com/images/7gAqnEQJV8UrCB0UrS8ppOz8HU.webp)

![An artistic depiction of a building's lobby showcasing elegant furnishings and a welcoming atmosphere.](https://framerusercontent.com/images/KasLUbf8BkmYKK7aoue8XS0Iiw.webp)

#### Owners & Guest

### Wellness & Performance

- Hormone Balancing

- Thermal Therapeutic IV Nutrient Program

- Skin treatment/vitality Programs

- Regenerative Therapy Massages &

- Treatment Thermal Spa & Shower Advanced

- Fitness Training Programs Nutrition

- Coaching Juice/Beverage/Meal Program


[Secure Access](https://firstaccess.ateliermiami.com/#contact)

Safe, Direct, Fast, Low Fees

## Move Over, Brickell.  The Roads is Miami’s Hottest New Neighborhood

Nestled just west of Brickell, The Roads is a rare gem that combines the charm of old Miami with the convenience of urban proximity.

![Atelier Location Near Brickell](https://framerusercontent.com/images/1bVdjj4ratF24zIAFpGEGkj1hM.webp)

## Claim Your Spot in Luxury Living

Get exclusive details on residences, pricing, and investment opportunities.
